# Vector Operations

> 2D and 3D vector math operations

**Category:** Ai · **Version:** 1.0.0 · **Tags:** ai · godot

## What this does

2D and 3D vector math operations

Specifies 7 acceptance outcomes that any implementation must satisfy, regardless of language or framework.

## What must be true

- **implementation:** Feature implemented in C++ engine core
- **platform_agnostic:** Works across desktop, web, mobile platforms

## Success & failure scenarios

**✅ Success paths**

- **Creation** — when Create vectors from components is requested, then Create vectors from components completed.
- **Normalization** — when Convert to unit vectors is requested, then Convert to unit vectors completed.
- **Length** — when Calculate magnitude is requested, then Calculate magnitude completed.
- **Dot Product** — when Measure parallelism is requested, then Measure parallelism completed.
- **Cross Product** — when Compute perpendicular normal (3D) is requested, then Compute perpendicular normal (3D) completed.
- **Interpolation** — when Linear and spherical blending is requested, then Linear and spherical blending completed.
- **Clamping** — when Constrain components within bounds is requested, then Constrain components within bounds completed.
